metadata.description: CIE Builder - Chuqlab Intelligence Engine Development Guidance System

plugins.name: cie-builder-plugin
plugins.description: Build the Chuqlab Intelligence Engine (CIE) - a multi-tenant correctional intelligence platform. Guides phased, TDD-driven development of a GovTech law enforcement platform on GCP with Go backend, React/Next.js frontend, Whisper transcription, Ruvector vector search, and full TX-RAMP/CJIS compliance.
